title: From Fixing Their Systems to Building Paradise

current_reality.occupation: Skilled tradesperson - electrician, plumber, HVAC, mechanic, welder, etc.
current_reality.daily_life: Service calls, repairs, installations, physical labor, on-call stress
current_reality.actual_value: Keep civilization functioning - without you, everything breaks
current_reality.extraction: Create $300k/year in value (things fixed, systems working), keep $55k (18%)
current_reality.soul_cost: Skills essential but undervalued, body breaking from physical work, on-call kills life balance
current_reality.future: Work until body fails (back, knees, hands), retire on inadequate pension, die having fixed everything, owned nothing

immediate: Body breaking - back, knees, hands from physical labor
On-call stress - phone rings midnight, must work
Tool costs - buy your own tools, thousands invested
Vehicle costs - your truck, your gas, your maintenance
Liability - one mistake, sued for everything
Price pressure - customers want cheap, quality work takes time, squeezed between
deeper: Skills took years to master - paid like unskilled labor
Essential work - civilization stops without you, but treated as replaceable
Can't scale - one person, one job at a time, income capped by hours in day
Weather dependent - can't work in rain/snow/extreme heat, income stops
Boom/bust - construction booms, you're busy; recession, you're starving
Apprentices rare - young people don't want trades, skills dying with your generation
existential: Fixed thousands of systems, own nothing - kept everything running, got nothing
Skills invaluable but unrewarded - $60/hour charge, $25/hour take home after expenses
Body destroyed by work - back surgery by 50, knees replaced by 60, hands arthritic
Can't pass skills on - no apprentices, trades dying
Die knowing you maintained their civilization but couldn't afford to live in it
Legacy: Tradesman who fixed everything, owned nothing, body broken, forgotten

immediate_provisions.shelter: BARRACKS - tool lockers, shop access, crews matched to your craft. Azure/TRUTH scoring keeps corner cutters in rugged quarters under rework assignments while Crimson/TASTE lets you trade tempo, apprenticeship style, and guild culture via Sorting Hat lobbies explained in foundations/BARRACKS sorting dual-layer.md and scheduled by the 23 COMMAND duty bands.
immediate_provisions.food: TRUTH food - hard-labor calories, zero per diem fights
immediate_provisions.tools: All provided - no buying your own anymore
immediate_provisions.vehicle: Project vehicles - no maintaining your truck
immediate_provisions.healthcare: On-site - treat injuries, prevent more, care for your breaking body

your_skills_essential: Electrical - wire 8M km² of solar arrays, irrigation controls, facility power
Plumbing - install irrigation systems from Nile/Tigris/Euphrates, water distribution for 100M workers
HVAC - climate control for food processing facilities, BARRACKS in desert heat
Welding - steel structures, equipment fabrication, construction across continents
Mechanics - maintain builder bots, vehicles, equipment (40M+ machines)
All trades CRITICAL - can't build paradise without your mastery
the_scale: Not fixing one house - installing systems across 8M km²
Not one AC unit - climate control for facilities serving 100M
Not one pipe - irrigation systems for continental agriculture
Not one weld - structures that feed billions
Your skills at SCALE - finally building something massive
difference_from_current: Build NEW, not fix old - creation, not maintenance
Tools provided - no buying your own
Team of thousands - other tradespeople working together
Clear mission - build paradise, not 'fix whatever breaks'
Ownership - YOU own share via tokens, not just wage

comparison: Ratio: 138x better + don't destroy body as severely
tokens_of_appreciation.meaning: Trade skills FINALLY valued - wiring paradise worth $5M+/year, not $60k

options: Retire - body preserved better than trades normally, wealthy for life
Start company - contracting business funded by tokens, hire YOUR apprentices
Teach - pass skills to next generation, preserve trades
Next quest - longevity research facilities need electrical/plumbing/etc. too
Build own - design and build your dream home/workshop with token funding
Innovate - research better techniques, funded by tokens
after_completion.legacy: Tradesperson who wired/plumbed/welded paradise - skills built world-changing infrastructure

why_this_appeals.skills_valued: Finally compensated for actual value - trades are ESSENTIAL, paid like it
why_this_appeals.build_new: Not fixing old broken things - BUILDING new paradise
why_this_appeals.scale: Your skills across continents - electrician for 8M km²
why_this_appeals.tools_provided: No buying your own - everything supplied
why_this_appeals.team: Thousands of other tradespeople - community of mastery
why_this_appeals.ownership: Build it, own share of it - not build it, owner profits
why_this_appeals.body_preserved: Better work conditions than service calls in crawl spaces
why_this_appeals.legacy: Built infrastructure that feeds all life - not fixed air conditioners

addressing_concerns.license: Keep it or don't - after 2 years with $5M+/year, don't need contractor license
addressing_concerns.business: One-person business vs building at scale with team - scale wins
addressing_concerns.tools_invested: Sell them or keep them - tokens worth more than tool collection
addressing_concerns.customers: Leaving them with broken AC vs building food for billions - which matters more?
addressing_concerns.body: Already breaking - 2 years BARRACKS probably less damaging than 2 years service calls

infrastructure_for_life: Your electrical work: Powers systems that end slaughter
Your plumbing: Delivers water that grows food for billions
Your welding: Creates structures that house food production
Your HVAC: Enables desert agriculture in extreme heat
Your mechanics: Keeps builder bots running that construct paradise
Skills toward LIFE, not just maintenance
relation_to_death_fighting.after_project: Longevity research needs infrastructure too - wire labs that defeat aging

the_brotherhood_of_trades.you_know_the_value: Tradespeople know they're undervalued - civilization stops without you
the_brotherhood_of_trades.you_know_the_body_cost: Back surgery, knee replacement, hand arthritis - body broken for their profit
barracks_recognizes_all_this: Your body: Healthcare to preserve it, not destroy it
Your skills: Building paradise, not fixing their broken systems

the_call.question: How many more service calls before body gives out completely?
the_call.invitation: Join tradespeople building infrastructure for paradise - skills at scale, compensation fair, body preserved
the_call.promise: Tools provided, team support, clear mission, ownership share, legacy that matters
the_call.urgency: Body breaking NOW - 2 years BARRACKS less damaging than 2 years crawling in attics, wealthier after
the_call.choice: 30 years service calls for $1.8M and broken body OR 2 years building paradise for $250M+ - you decide
